name: EUR/USD

patterns.name: Doji
patterns.note: A pattern with no level is just a candle. Ignore it.

patterns.name: Shooting star / bearish pin
patterns.note: Missing full confluence — it needs a level AND the trend or RSI to agree. Wait for confirmation.

chartist.read: Daily bearish, price under the EMAs; choppy. RSI 50.6. Nearest level 1.145 (-23.0 pips). No trigger at a level yet.

quant.read: Volatility dead/coiling (1H ATR ~8 pips). No edge in a low-vol mid-range — size would be minimum.

risk.read: Gate CLOSED. Nothing fits the 1% rule right now — the veto holds, capital protected.

trade.read: On standby until a level and a clean trigger appear together.
